lines.gurmukhi: ਤਜਿ ਮਾਨ ਮੋਹ ਵਿਕਾਰ ਮਿਥਿਆ ਜਪਿ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: taj maan moh vikaar mithiaa jap raam raam raam |
lines.english: Renounce pride, attachment, corruption and falsehood, and chant the Name of the Lord, Raam, Raam, Raam.
O mortal, attach yourself to the Feet of the Saints. ||1||
Perform His devotional worship, O Nanak, and your destiny shall be fulfilled. ||2||4||155||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਦੀਨ ਦਇਆਲ ਪਤਿਤ ਪਾਵਨ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਹਰਿ ਚਰਣ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਜਾਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: prabh gopaal deen deaal patit paavan paarabraham har charan simar jaag |
lines.english: God is the Sustainer of the world, Merciful to the meek, the Purifier of sinners, the Transcendent Lord God. Awaken, and meditate on His Feet.
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਖ ਸੋਗ ਬੈਰਾਗ ਅਨੰਦੀ ਖੇਲੁ ਰੀ ਦਿਖਾਇਓ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: harakh sog bairaag anandee khel ree dikhaaeo |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Pleasure and pain, detachment and ecstasy - the Lord has revealed His Play. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨਹੂੰ ਭੈ ਨਿਰਭੈ ਖਿਨਹੂੰ ਖਿਨਹੂੰ ਉਠਿ ਧਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: khinahoon bhai nirabhai khinahoon khinahoon utth dhaaeo |
lines.english: One moment, the mortal is in fear, and the next moment he is fearless; in a moment, he gets up and departs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨਹੂੰ ਰਸ ਭੋਗਨ ਖਿਨਹੂੰ ਖਿਨਹੂ ਤਜਿ ਜਾਇਓ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: khinahoon ras bhogan khinahoon khinahoo taj jaaeo |1|
lines.english: One moment, he enjoys pleasures, and the next moment, he leaves and goes away. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨਹੂੰ ਜੋਗ ਤਾਪ ਬਹੁ ਪੂਜਾ ਖਿਨਹੂੰ ਭਰਮਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: khinahoon jog taap bahu poojaa khinahoon bharamaaeo |
lines.english: One moment, he practices Yoga and intense meditation, and all sorts of worship; the next moment, he wanders in doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨਹੂੰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗੁ ਲਾਇਓ ॥੨॥੫॥੧੫੬॥
lines.translit: khinahoon kirapaa saadhoo sang naanak har rang laaeo |2|5|156|
lines.english: One moment, O Nanak, the Lord bestows His Mercy and blesses him with His Love, in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. ||2||5||156||
Raag Aasaa, Fifth Mehl, Seventeenth House, Aasaavaree:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Cherish the Beloved Lord, Har, Har, in your mind.
Meditate on the Lord, the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਕਹਿਆ ਸੁ ਚਿਤਿ ਧਰਿ ਹਾਂ ॥
lines.translit: gur kahiaa su chit dhar haan |
lines.english: The Guru says to install it in your consciousness.
Turn away from others, and turn to Him.
The fool is stuck;
In the pool of the world is the mud of attachment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸੇ ਲਾਲਨੁ ਪਾਇਓ ਰੀ ਸਖੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aise laalan paaeo ree sakhee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Thus you shall obtain your Beloved, O my companion. ||1||Pause||
Stuck in it, his feet cannot walk towards the Lord.
he cannot do anything else.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਉ ਨਿਕਸੈ ਸਰਨਿ ਪੈ ਰੀ ਸਖੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tau nikasai saran pai ree sakhee |1|
lines.english: Only by entering the Lord's Sanctuary, O my companion, will you be released. ||1||
Thus your consciousness shall be stable and steady and firm.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਲੋਗ ਅਲੋਗੀ ਰੀ ਸਖੀ ॥੨॥੧॥੧੫੭॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak log alogee ree sakhee |2|1|157|
lines.english: Says Nanak, this is the way to dwell with the people, and yet remain apart from them. ||2||1||157||
Deep within dwells the One Husband Lord;
Practice Raja Yoga, the Yoga of meditation and success.
outwardly, there are many distractions.
Wilderness and household are the same.
Aasaavaree, Fifth Mehl:
meditate continually on the Guru.
Cherish one desire only:
Install the wisdom of the Saints' Mantra.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਉ ਮਿਲੀਐ ਗੁਰ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਨਿ ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tau mileeai gur kripaan mere manaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: and you shall meet Him, by Guru's Grace, O my mind. ||1||Pause||
Serve the Feet of the Guru,
The fear of death is dispelled,
All doubts are dispelled,
and the primal place is obtained.
and the Lord is seen to be pervading all places.
One who has such destiny recorded upon his forehead, obtains it;
he crosses over the terrifying ocean of fire.
Then, all subservience is removed. ||1||
He obtains a place in the home of his own self,
Nanak, he is absorbed in celestial peace, O my mind. ||2||2||158||
and enjoys the most sublime essence of the Lord's essence.
His hunger is appeased;
Sing the Praises of the Lord, Har, Har, Har.
Aasaavaree, Fifth Mehl:
I have heard that this is the way to emancipation.
Meditate on the celestial music.
The tongues of the holy Saints repeat it.
The silent sages search for Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਈਐ ਵਡ ਪੁਨੀ ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: paaeeai vadd punee mere manaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: This is found by the greatest merit, O my mind. ||1||Pause||
God is the Master of all.
O my mind, serve Him.
He is the Dispeller of distress.
It is so difficult to find Him in this world, in this Dark Age of Kali Yuga.
God is the Fulfiller of desires, O my mind. ||1||
